data.title: Repurchases of shares by EQT AB during week 13, 2026
data.description: On March 30, 2026, in Stockholm, EQT AB (LEI code 213800U7P9GOIRKCTB34) announced the repurchase of 383,448 of its own ordinary shares (ISIN: SE0012853455) between March 23 and March 27, 2026. This buyback is part of a larger program allowing for the repurchase of up to 3,005,071 own shares.

data.title: Office of His Highness Sheikh Hamdan Bin Ahmed Al Maktoum Holdings & Gatbits IT Infrastructure Announce Launch of GTBS Digital Ecosystem; Mainnet Set for April 2026
data.description: On December 25, the GTBS Digital Ecosystem from Dubai, United Arab Emirates, made an official announcement regarding the launch of its native GTBS Coin.

data.title: Orderfox Schweiz AG Introduces Gieni ABX in collaboration with Microsoft: A Frontier AI Solution That Executes Work to Completion
data.description: Orderfox Schweiz AG unveiled Gieni ABX (Autonomous Business Execution Intelligence) in Zurich on March 30, 2026. This new system aims to close the execution gap by providing finished outcomes through AI, rather than mere recommendations. This innovation signifies a shift towards greater efficiency and effectiveness in operations.

data.title: Users of Bluesky rebel against Attie AI tool, surpassing ICE and White House accounts in blocking - defying the trend on Elon Musk's X.
data.description: Attie, Bluesky's latest AI tool, faced immediate criticism from users hesitant about automation, showcasing a stark contrast to the positive reception of Elon Musk's X.

data.title: NerdWallet names Freedom Debt Relief the best debt settlement company for customer-first features
data.description: One of the most comprehensive and cost-effective debt settlement programs in the nation, Freedom Debt Relief, has been recognized by NerdWallet for its unique features. Based in San Mateo, California, as of March 30, 2026, Freedom Debt Relief stands out as a leading provider in the industry.

data.title: Mercy St. Louis Uses Sci-Fi-Like Tech to Destroy Liver Tumors Without a Single Incision
data.description: A histotripsy system is set to be introduced at Mercy Hospital St. Louis, marking a significant medical milestone in Missouri. This cutting-edge technology uses bubble clouds to destroy tumors, showcasing innovation in surgical oncology. Mercy Hospital St. Louis will be among the first 100 in the U.S. to implement this system, highlighting its position at the forefront of medical advancements. The debut of this technology signifies a groundbreaking approach to treating tumors, underlining the hospital's commitment to pioneering healthcare practices.

data.title: CENIC Sentinel: a Disaster Recovery Solution To Ensure CENIC Members Remain Connected During Emergencies
data.description: In a recent announcement, CENIC introduced the CENIC Sentinel program, designed as a disaster recovery solution to maintain connectivity for CENIC members amid emergencies. This initiative aims to ensure that members in regions such as La Mirada, Calif., and San Francisco can stay connected. CENIC Sentinel is part of the broader efforts to enhance network resilience in critical situations. This program will help safeguard the digital fiber infrastructure, enabling members to remain connected with vital services during crisis situations.

data.title: Red Cat Closes Acquisition of Apium Swarm Robotics
data.description: Red Cat has broadened its expertise in swarming autonomy through a recent acquisition, highlighting the U.S.'s increased focus on investing in small drone technology. This move underscores the growing importance of drone innovation, with the industry witnessing substantial investments to enhance capabilities.

data.title: Mphasis and Flagstar Bank Mark Major Milestone by Completing First Phase of Modernizing the Bank's Technology Infrastructure
data.description: After one year of working together, a new data-center and cloud platform has been successfully developed, enhancing operational resilience and boosting performance. The collaboration has resulted in significant improvements for Mphasis, a global technology solutions provider. The company, listed on the Bombay Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol 526299 and on the National Stock Exchange under MPHASIS, has achieved these milestones through its AI-driven and platform-focused approach. The developments were announced in New York on March 30, 2026.

data.title: ST Engineering iDirect Appoints Sridhar Kuppanna as Chief Executive Officer
data.description: In Herndon, Virginia, on March 30, 2026, ST Engineering iDirect declared a change in leadership with the appointment of Sridhar Kuppanna as the new Chief Executive Officer, taking over from Don Claussen. Kuppanna, formerly the Chief Technology Officer, will now lead the global satellite communications company.

data.title: Statement from Shelley McNeil, President of CUPE Local 5047 – Halifax Regional Centre for Education
data.description: In Halifax, NS, school librarians from Canadian Union of Public Employees (CUPE) Local 5047 within Halifax Regional Centre for Education play a crucial role in maintaining literacy levels in schools. These members offer support to struggling students, foster spaces promoting curiosity and inclusion, and ensure students encounter diverse representations in their reading material. These indispensable services are currently undervalued, regarded as dispensable when they are actually fundamental to education.

data.title: Qualstar Corporation Reports Fourth Quarter 2025 Results
data.description: On March 30, 2026, in Camarillo, California, Qualstar Corporation (OTC: QBAK) disclosed their financial performance for the quarter concluding on December 31, 2025. Qualstar is renowned for offering scalable data storage and high-efficiency power solutions.

data.title: In HelloNation, Real Estate Experts Pam and Barry Explain Buying or Selling in the Military Market
data.description: A recent report discusses the unique factors impacting real estate decisions near military bases, including PCS timelines, VA loans, and local demand. The analysis, based in Lawton, Oklahoma, on March 30, 2026, highlights the importance of understanding these variables when navigating the military housing market. This specific market stands out due to its reliance on factors such as PCS timelines for military personnel, the prevalence of VA loans for housing financing, and the influence of local demand on property values. Compared to conventional real estate transactions, these aspects play a crucial role in determining the success of buying or selling properties near military installations. HelloNation, a leading real estate platform, shed light on these dynamics, emphasizing the significance of staying informed about the unique intricacies of the military housing market to make well-informed decisions.
